_task: For each lead below, search the web (by name + address + phone) for the restaurant's official website and public contact info. Fill in the empty fields. Do NOT modify 'camis', 'name', 'address', or other context fields. Leave a field as "" if you cannot find it with reasonable confidence. Return this same JSON structure with the fields populated.

_field_guide.website: Official site URL (https://...). Prefer the restaurant's own domain over aggregators (Yelp, DoorDash, Facebook).
_field_guide.email: Best single public contact email (info@, hello@, owner). Avoid generic noreply@.
_field_guide.additional_emails: Any other public emails, separated by '; '.
_field_guide.instagram_or_social: Primary Instagram/social URL if no website exists.
_field_guide.source_url: The page where you found the website/email (for verification).
_field_guide.confidence: high | medium | low — your certainty this is the right establishment.
_field_guide.notes: Anything useful: 'permanently closed', 'chain location', ambiguous match, etc.

_source: NYC DOHMH restaurant inspections (43nn-pn8j), first inspection within last 90 days, Brooklyn + Manhattan
